# Copilot Instructions

Before suggesting or generating code, follow the repository contract in `AGENTS.md`.

Important rules:
- Put Streamlit page files only in `app.py` or `pages/`.
- Put reusable logic only under `src/`.
- Update `docs/PAGE_REGISTRY.md` when a page is added, removed, or materially changed.
- Update `docs/TASK_LOG.md` after each AI work session.
- Do not commit secrets, generated exports, or raw private datasets.
